The '''Tolos''' were one of two [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]' [[Panto system]]. Having evolved on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toloran]], they worked together with the [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] [[Lomin]]s of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] first planet, [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]], to create a system-wide tourist resort. On the Tolos' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], they offered a range of recreational winter activities.

==History==
The Tolos were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Toloran]], the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Panto system]],<ref name="TTSB">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref> and part of the [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was a cold planet, covered in snow and mountains, and they shared it with non-sentient [[ice dragon]]s. The Tolos worked together with a second intelligent species native to the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] [[Lomin]]s of [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]].<ref name="TTSB" /> Together, the two species established the entire system as a multi-tiered tourist resort for beings from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Fact">{{FactFile|124|PAN 1-2|Pantolomin}}</ref>

Numerous winter activities were offered on the Tolos' homeworld, including [[repulsor skiing]], [[Hoversled/Legends|hover sledding]], and wilderness survival camps. Tourists could also travel on the ''[[Snow Nara]]'' [[ice barge]] through ice floes and on hunting expeditions for ice dragons.<ref name="TTSB" /> These activities complemented the [[Water/Legends|underwater]] tours and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] available on Pantolomin,<ref name="Fact" /> and the zero-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] activities available on the system's third planet, [[Atloran]]. The Tolos shared representation with the Lomins on the system's [[Board of Tourism|tourism board]].<ref name="TTSB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tolos were created by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for the [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1993]]. This information was later republished in ''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' in [[1996]]. Slavicsek never described the Tolos, and despite an additional mention in the Pantolomin article appearing in [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 124|issue 124]] of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', they are still without an official description.
